Overview   Package  Class  Use  Tree  Deprecated  Index  Help 
 PREV PACKAGE   NEXT PACKAGE FRAMES    NO FRAMES    

Package javax.media.mscontrol

Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API.

See:
          Description

Interface Summary
Configuration<R extends ResourceContainer> A Configuration designates a particular instance of MediaConfig.
EventType An EventType indicates the type of event that a Resource sends.
MediaConfig This class defines the internal structure of a ResourceContainer.
MediaErr Definition of the most common errors, as MediaErr instances.
MediaEvent<S> An event from a MediaEventNotifier.
MediaEventListener<T extends MediaEvent<?>> To receive events, an application must register a class extending this interface.
MediaEventNotifier<T extends MediaEvent<?>> The class of objects that can send MediaEvent to listeners
MediaObject A base class for objects that are created by a Factory, can be released, and can be parameterized.
MediaSession A MediaSession is a container and factory for media objects.
MsControlFactory This factory creates MediaSessions.
Parameter A Parameter designates a parameter for Resource operation, like Player.MAX_DURATION.
Parameters This class is a Map of (Parameter=value) pairs.
Qualifier A Qualifier indicates why or how an operation completed.
SupportedFeatures Allow to query for the capabilities supported by the implementation.
Value A Value is a designator for a particular (enumerated) value of a Parameter.
 

Exception Summary
MediaConfigException The class of things that go wrong during media configuration.
MediaException MediaException is the parent for [non-Runtime] media Exceptions
MediaServiceException The class of things that go wrong in MediaService methods.
MsControlException General purpose exception
TimeoutException Exception thrown when an operation would last more than MediaSession.TIMEOUT
TranscodingException  
UnsupportedException The class of things that go wrong on the media server when it does not support a media operation sent
WrongStateException  
 

Package javax.media.mscontrol Description

Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API.

Package Specification

Contains the core interfaces, for creation (MediaSession), configuration (MediaConfig) and joining (Joinable) of MediaObjects.
